## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Specification change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test` in affected packages)
- [ ] Type-checking passes (`npm run lint` in affected packages)
- [ ] **If spec/schema/types changed**: I updated all three of:
  - [ ] `MRSF-v1.0.md` (specification)
  - [ ] `mrsf.schema.json` (JSON Schema)
  - [ ] `cli/src/lib/types.ts` (TypeScript types)
- [ ] New/changed behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Documentation is updated (if applicable)
